name: Athena Bitcoin Global
summary: Athena Bitcoin Inc. operates a network of bitcoin and other crypto ATMs in North and South America. The company's peer-to-peer exchanges enable individuals to buy and sell bitcoin and bitcoin cash without an ATM. It also provides advisory services on a range of equity and fixed income transactions for companies and real estate developers. The company was founded in 2015 and is based in Chicago, Illinois with a network of locations in California, Florida, Georgia, Illinois, Missouri, Ohio, Pennsylvania, and Texas.
